summary: Great spring ’94 show with standout Days Between and Lazy River Road, captured in excellent audience sound.
review: The performance is energetic and features a superb first set highlighted by Peggy‑O, So Many Roads, Scarlet > Fire, Lazy River Road and an unforgettable Days Between. Reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear audience recording, though some note a weaker second‑set opener (Scarlet > Fire) and occasional wavering from Jerry in set 2.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the sound quality and many songs, especially Days Between and Lazy River Road, while a few point out a weak Scarlet > Fire opener; overall this balances to a strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers describe the sound as crisp, great and excellent; no major drop‑outs or distortion were reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set 1 is praised for its energy and song selection; Set 2 starts with a weaker Scarlet > Fire but recovers later, maintaining the high‑energy vibe typical of spring ’94 shows.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Generally lauded for an incredible performance and warm‑up tune; some reviewers note wavering in set 2 and a near miss on Days Between before rallying.
